title: 词鼠书记 WordMemo — 影子跟读 + 发音测评 接口契约

contracts.name: VideoImportService

params.name: uri
params.desc: 本地视频URI（通过SAF文件选择器获取）

contracts.data_flow:
用户点击'导入B站视频' → 输入URL → yt-dlp解析→下载mp4→存至app内部存储(shadowing_videos目录) → 写入ShadowingVideoEntity到Room → UI刷新列表.
本地导入: SAF文件选择器 → ContentResolver复制到内部存储 → 同上.
contracts.layout_constraints: 无UI. 进度通过Flow<DownloadProgress>暴露给ViewModel.
contracts.notes: v1使用youtubedl-android wrapper. 下载进度通过共享Flow回调. 下载目录: context.filesDir/shadowing_videos/

contracts.name: ShadowingRepository

methods.name: observeVideos
methods.desc: 观察所有影子跟读视频列表

methods.name: getSentencesForVideo
methods.desc: 获取视频的句子列表（按时间戳排序）

methods.name: saveRecording
methods.desc: 保存用户跟读录音, 返回recordId

contracts.data_flow:
ViewModel → ShadowingRepository → ShadowingVideoDao / ShadowingSentenceDao / ShadowingRecordDao → Room DB.
数据返向: Room Flow → Repository Flow → ViewModel StateFlow → Compose UI.
contracts.layout_constraints: 无UI约束. Repository层纯数据操作.

contracts.name: PronunciationAssessor

methods.name: assessPronunciation

params.name: recordedText
params.desc: ASR识别的用户实际朗读文本

params.name: wordTimings
params.desc: v2: ASR返回的逐词时间戳

methods.desc: v1: 调用DeepSeek API进行文本级差异分析. v2: 接入whisper.cpp实现本地音素级测评.

methods.name: transcribeAudio
methods.desc: v1: ASR调用在线API(复用DeepSeek API). v2: 切换到本地whisper.cpp.

contracts.data_flow:
[v1] 音频文件路径 → transcribeAudio() → 在线ASR → 返回转录文本 → assessPronunciation(原文, 转录) → DeepSeek API → 返回差异分析 → 存入Room.
[v2 计划] 音频文件 → whisper.cpp本地推理 → 逐词时间戳 → 音素级别对比 → 给出分维度得分.
contracts.layout_constraints: 无UI. 测评结果通过PronunciationAssessment模型类传递.

contracts.name: ShadowingViewModel — ShadowingScreen UI State Contract
contracts.data_flow: 用户操作 → ShadowingEvent → ViewModel.onEvent() → (调用Repository/Service) → 更新ShadowingUiState(StateFlow) → Compose重组.
contracts.layout_constraints: ShadowingScreen需要: 上方视频播放区(ExoPlayer), 中间句子列表+高亮当前句, 下方录音/回放控制栏.

contracts.name: PronunciationViewModel — PronunciationScreen UI State Contract
contracts.data_flow: 用户选择原文句子 → SetTargetSentence → 点击录音 → StartRecording→系统录音 → StopRecording → 音频保存至ShadowingRecord → AssessPronunciation → transcribeAudio() → assessPronunciation() → 更新assessment → 存入AssessmentRecord → UI展示评分.
contracts.layout_constraints: PronunciationScreen需要: 目标文本展示区, 录音控制按钮(开始/停止/回放), 评分结果卡片(准确率/流利度/完整度各维度).

contracts.name: 跨模块接口: M2(发音测评) 复用 M1(影子跟读) 录音的契约
contracts.description: 发音测评模块(M2)直接复用影子跟读模块(M1)的录音文件 + ShadowingRepository中的录音CRUD接口. 不重复实现录音存储逻辑.

reused_interfaces: ShadowingRepository.saveRecording() — 保存录音文件后返回recordId
ShadowingRepository.getRecordingsForSentence() — 获取某句子的所有录音列表
ShadowingRecord 模型 — M2直接使用该模型作为录音源数据

m2_specific_extensions.fromShadowingRecord: PronunciationViewModel 通过 selectRecording(recordId) 从 ShadowingRepository 加载 ShadowingRecord, 提取 audioFilePath 传递给 PronunciationAssessor.transcribeAudio()
m2_specific_extensions.assessment_result_storage: 测评结果存入本模块独立的 AssessmentRecord + PhonemeScore 表, 但通过 foreign key (recordId) 关联到 M1 的 shadowing_records 表

contract.data_flow: M2用户选择某条录音记录 → PronunciationViewModel.getRecordingsForSentence() [M1 API] → 得到录音列表 → 用户选取一条 → 提取audioFilePath → PronunciationAssessor.transcribeAudio(filePath) → AI测评 → 结果存M2的assessment_records表(关联recordId)

contracts.layout_constraints: 无额外UI约束. M2的PronunciationScreen可内嵌在ShadowingScreen的句子详情页, 也可独立入口.

methods.name: observeAll
methods.sql: SELECT * FROM shadowing_videos ORDER BY created_at DESC

methods.name: observeByVideoId
methods.sql: SELECT * FROM shadowing_sentences WHERE video_id = :videoId ORDER BY start_time ASC

methods.name: observeBySentenceId
methods.sql: SELECT * FROM shadowing_records WHERE sentence_id = :sentenceId ORDER BY created_at DESC

methods.name: observeByRecordId
methods.desc: 通过关联的录音ID查询测评结果

methods.name: observeBySentenceId
methods.sql: SELECT * FROM assessment_records WHERE sentence_id = :sentenceId ORDER BY created_at DESC
